steps: File formal tax reclaim with Australian Taxation Office for BHP Group Ltd dividend citing AU-NO treaty 15% rate vs 25% withheld
Submit Norwegian tax residency certificate and beneficial ownership declaration to support treaty eligibility
Contact Citigroup Australia to initiate custodian-assisted reclaim process for AUD 138,750.00 overpayment
Monitor ATO processing timeline and follow up if no response within 90 days
